title: obione pungens
intro: Obione pungens, also known as Sea Purslane, is a succulent plant that thrives in coastal areas, particularly in salt marshes and sandy beaches. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Obione pungens include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Obione pungens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a garnish in various dishes.
